## Change Logs

### Changes

* Added support for Yggdrasil authentication.

### Bug fixes and improvements

* Switch to ESM.
* _Server Status_ now supports older versions of Minecraft.
* Fixed unhandled exceptions when extracting resources.
* Removed `node-fetch` dependency (now using `node:fetch`).
* Removed `uuid` dependency (now using `node:crypto`).
* Improved JSDoc.
